steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
Sentence 1: glaciers in the mountains are at least 60 million years old.
Sentence 2: Antarctica had glaciers before its 34-million-year-old ice sheet.

Sentence 2 is the logical conclusion drawn from Sentence 1 — a cause-to-effect, evidence-to-conclusion link.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Thus signals a conclusion drawn from prior evidence — exactly the relationship here.

By contrast, even so, and nevertheless all signal contrast, but Sentence 2 doesn't contradict Sentence 1.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
